overview.description: Solo AI consultant, trainer, and educator helping individuals and companies adopt AI tools in practice
overview.description_long: Tomáš Kapler is a Prague-based freelance AI consultant and trainer with 25+ years of experience helping companies with online projects. He lectures, writes, and delivers workshops on practical AI tools including ChatGPT, Microsoft Copilot, Google Gemini, Midjourney, and others. He helps companies adopt AI quickly and effectively, covering prompt engineering, AI agents, hallucination prevention, and workflow automation. He also blogs on AI at kapler.cz with 4,190+ newsletter subscribers.
overview.tagline: Umělá inteligence nenahradí lidi – ale ti co AI používají, nahradí ty, kteří ji nepoužívají

history.origin_story: Tomáš Kapler spent 25 years helping small and large companies with online projects and schools with STEM education. As AI emerged as a transformative technology, he pivoted to focus entirely on practical AI adoption, becoming a solo AI consultant and educator.

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Tomáš Kapler's core value proposition is teaching people to use off-the-shelf AI tools (ChatGPT, Copilot, Gemini, Midjourney). As foundation models become more intuitive and self-explanatory, demand for hands-on training workshops is likely to decrease significantly — the very tools he teaches are evolving to need less training.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: The AI training and workshops market is highly fragmented and crowded with both freelancers and large training firms. As AI tools become easier to use natively, demand for third-party AI training is under structural pressure. Solo operator with no defensible niche or proprietary curriculum.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Solo freelancer operating without external funding or backing. Revenue entirely dependent on personal consulting engagements and workshop bookings. No investor support, no runway signals, and no disclosed revenue.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: As a solo AI trainer/consultant with no proprietary technology, no funding, and a value proposition directly threatened by the commoditization of the tools he teaches, Tomáš Kapler faces high risk across all dimensions. Short-term demand exists but structural headwinds are significant.

metadata.notes: Tomáš Kapler is an individual freelance consultant and AI educator, not a traditional company. Listed under category 'company' in the index but operates as a sole proprietor. CNAIP page confirmed at https://www.cnaip.cz/cs/entity/tomas-kapler (despite null cnaip_url in source record).
